authors: De La Porte C, Van de Kelft E
title: Spinal cord stimulation in failed back surgery syndrome
study_question: Assess SCS in FBSS patients, identify predictors of long-term outcome.
population_assessed: 78 patients with FBSS undergoing SCS trial, 64 received implant.
outcome_measures: Pain relief, medication reduction, lifestyle change, device use.
inclusion_criteria: Proved FBSS, no surgically treatable lesion, no major psychiatric pathology, >=75% pain relief during trial.
answer_to_study_question: 55% had >=50% pain relief, 90% reduced medication, 61% improved lifestyle.
